title: Dave Inc Q2 2024 Earnings Summary
text:
Dave Inc reported strong Q2 2024 results with revenue of $80.1 million, representing a 31% year-over-year increase. The company achieved profitability with net income of $6.4 million, compared to a prior-year loss of $22.6 million.

Adjusted EBITDA reached $15.2 million versus a $13.1 million loss in the same period last year. Adjusted net income came in at $13.7 million, a significant swing from an adjusted net loss of $15.8 million.

Key Operational Metrics:
- Monthly transacting members grew 18% year-over-year to 2.3 million users
- Average revenue per user increased 11% annually
- The company originated $1.2 billion in extra cash products, reflecting 37% year-over-year growth
- Credit quality improved with the 28-day delinquency rate declining to 2.03%, down 80 basis points year-over-year
- Provision for credit losses decreased 9% to $14.4 million

Financial Position & Guidance:
- Cash and equivalents totaled $89.7 million as of June 30, 2024
- Marketing expenses fell 28% year-over-year to $10.7 million
- Management raised 2024 guidance, projecting revenue of $310–$325 million and adjusted EBITDA of $40–$50 million

Management Outlook: CEO Jason Wilk expressed confidence in sustaining 20%+ growth for many quarters and maintaining positive EBITDA without requiring additional capital.
